calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sulliavn, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: L. Gillian # 12355.
Petitioner SEOK-WON SEONG was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The petitioner presented indentification showing that he lives in Stanford, CA.

The petitioner present paycheck stubs and letter/receipt with a San Francisco address to the
Court as proof of San Francisco residency, which the Court accepts.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to ALAN SEOKWON SEONG

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
